历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 21351 → 27025 → 25068 → 26006 → 34136, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 8130 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12785 places over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 34136. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 286 in 2021, 300 in 2022, 298 in 2023, 296 in 2024, and 322 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 351, an increase of about 9% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 165 in 2021 → 157 in 2022 → 138 in 2023 → 136 in 2024 → 140 in 2025 → 135 in 2026, showing a stable upward trend in recent years, ranking 135th nationally in 2026. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory condition controversy), but no major negative public opinion in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 58th, rated as 'relatively hot', with 16 videos having a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating above-average attention among 211 universities. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University did not enter the A- or above level, but it has traditional advantages in agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, with high application popularity for majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (History Category 58,374 + Physics Category 121,443 ≈ 179,817). By proportion, Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 147,600, significantly expanding the competition base. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, relatively close to Gansu, and is an important 211 university in the northwest region, offering some regional appeal to Gansu examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), with a relatively stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34,136, the backward pull of about 9% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 21.6% in Gansu Physics Category examinees; given that the expansion of examinee numbers far exceeds the enrollment expansion, overall competitive pressure rises. The predicted minimum ranking is about 36,000, with a range of 35,500–36,500.

Rankings better than 35,500 can focus on impacting popular majors like Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Electrical Engineering. Rankings around 36,500 should mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors, supplemented by Tier 3 safety majors. The university's medical, electrical, and computer majors have high application popularity, while agriculture, forestry, and animal science majors have relatively milder competition.
